channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Inflation exceeds 4% for first time in three years due to gasoline price spike
item.description: Inflation has hit its highest level in over three years following the US and Israel's war on Iran, which caused a gasoline price surge.

item.title: Major student loan changes take effect July 1: What borrowers should know
item.description: A popular repayment plan ends, two new ones begin, and many borrowers will face new loan limits.

item.title: Taiwan conducts drills with US rocket system, firing toward China
item.description: Wednesday's exercise was the first time the US-supplied HIMARS system was used in the Taiwan Strait.

item.title: China refocuses ties with North Korea amid nuclear silence shifting balance
item.description: Xi's omission of North Korea's nuclear program came as Kim sought to assert the permanence of his country's nuclear status.
